violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to add an indicating symbol to menu to disclose which menu items are available raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Prep Unit #1 located in the cookline area closest to the fryolators was not functional and not in good repair. Establishment is to repair, remove, or replace unit if not no longer functional. Establishment was not storing TCS food items within the unit at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The floors in the dry storage areas have an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Lettuce was observed held at 69 degrees Fahrenheit in a broken prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, food items had been placed into unit less than 2 hours prior to the time of inspection and was moved into the freezer to rapidly cool. Establishment is not to store TCS food items in unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Establishment is using time as a public health control for pizza by the slice. Establishment currently does have prior approval for TPHC process and shall cease practice and apply for approval. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to add an indicating symbol to menu to disclose which menu items are available raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Prep Unit #1 located in the cookline area closest to the fryolators was not functional and not in good repair. Establishment is to repair, remove, or replace unit if not no longer functional. Establishment shall not store TCS food items within the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The floors in the dry storage areas have an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The prep unit cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

Prep unit #1 was observed held at an ambient temperature of 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment replaced previous unit with equipment from other location. Food items within unit had been loaded into unit less than 4 hours prior to inspection and were moved to other refrigeration. Prep unit temperature gauge was adjusted during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The prep unit cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine and test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to order test strips for both sanitizing solutions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Food preparation sink was observed with an air break. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was sent through dish machine during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Prep Unit #1 was observed held at an ambient temperature of 68 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within unit had been loaded into unit less than 2 hours ago. Food items were moved into other refrigeration to rapidly cool. Per PIC, establishment had called for service and was waiting on service arrival to repair unit. Establishment is not to use unit to store TCS foods until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below is achieved. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Various spray bottles were observed throughout the facility without labels indicating common name of contents. Spray bottles were labeled at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The prep unit cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine and test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to order test strips for both sanitizing solutions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Food preparation sink was observed with an air break. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The ventilation hood system above the fryers was observed with drips and other residue forming from ansul pipes and the filters. Establishment is clean hood filters and to have company service ventilation hood system. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of floors behign shelving and equipment in back kitchen were have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. FMC07215 expired 1-31-05. PIC shall reinstate food safety manager license. Consultant list was provided at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Various spray bottles were observed not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

Desserts for self service in Coke Beverage unit packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Desserts were moved to walk-in during inspection. Establishment shall create labels before returning product to self-service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

The presence of little flies is not controlled as evidenced by little flies in back room near and around dish machine, 3 bay sink and walls throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment has pest control company. Establishment shall have pest control come to address the flies and shall come as frequently as possible to eliminate pests. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the drains, pipes, floors and walls behind equipment in back room and on production line were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Areas shall be cleaned sanitized and maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
Establishment is lacking an air gap at food prep sink. Establishment shall add air gap to food prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023
